name: Taiwan (TSMC)
summary: Day 68 Wednesday. TAIEX 41,138.85 (+0.9% 1D, +26.3% 1M, +29.4% 3M) — TSMC + Samsung halo from KOSPI breakthrough + AI capex ecosystem dominance. The May 5-6 sequence (Apple-Samsung-Intel chip-production exploratory talks → Samsung $1T market cap, KOSPI +6.7% to 7,400) is the structural validation of the AI-cycle decoupling thesis — for major Asian tech exporters the cycle has structurally separated from West Asia geopolitical risk. Apple's potential diversification beyond TSMC (Apple-Samsung-Intel talks) is a forward demand-channel risk, but TSMC's structural position remains dominant in node leadership. SMH +3.1% to $522.69 (+32.0% 1M) is TSMC ecosystem confirmation. Helium cascade falsification stays intact at tier-1 chipmaker level. Chip complex decoupled from crisis (~5% crisis attribution); 95%+ AI capex driven. Patel/SemiAnalysis bifurcation thesis sharpens: hyperscaler FCF risk by 2027 = forward customer-base risk, but current cycle remains supportive.

active_triggers.condition: TSMC announces production reduction or allocation changes due to helium/gas supply

recent_signals.headline: TAIWAN TAIEX -1.0% PROFIT-TAKING AFTER 1M +19.7%; APPLE BEAT REINFORCES TSMC THESIS
